mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tbl_news ORDER BY credate_dt DESC
SELECT * FROM tbl_news ORDER BY credate_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT n.*, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_url AS filePath, c.cd_kor AS categoryName, parent_c.cd_kor AS parentCategoryName -- 부모 카테고리명 추가 FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.file_ref_id, f.file_name, f.file_url FROM tbl_file f WHERE f.file_gbn_cd = 100 -- 대표 이미지 유형 코드 ORDER BY f.inst_dt DESC ) f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo c ON n.main_category_cd = c.cd -- main_category_cd와 일치하는 cd 가져옴 LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo parent_c ON c.parent_cd = parent_c.cd -- 부모 코드의 한글명 가져옴 WHERE n.main_category_cd = #{category} ORDER BY n.update_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset};

SELECT n.*, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_url AS filePath, mc.cd_kor AS categoryName, sc.cd_kor AS subCategoryName, parent_mc.cd_kor AS parentCategoryName FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.file_ref_id, f.file_name, f.file_url FROM tbl_file f WHERE f.file_gbn_cd = 100 ORDER BY f.inst_dt DESC ) f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo mc ON n.main_category_cd = mc.cd LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo parent_mc ON mc.parent_cd = parent_mc.cd LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo sc ON n.sub_category_cd = sc.cd WHERE n.sub_category_cd = #{subCategory} ORDER BY n.update_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_news WHERE main_category_cd = #{category}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_news WHERE sub_category_cd = #{category}
